response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and leadership roles, but his background in developer tools and build systems is limited to recent AI-agent infrastructure work (re:cinq) and some dev-ops tooling (Altom Consulting). He lacks direct mobile-platform experience and organizational change leadership, which are preferred. His technical leadership and people management experience are strong, but the alignment with this specific role's focus areas is only partial.
strengths: 15+ years of software development with deep technical expertise across multiple languages and domains
Proven leadership in people management and team development (e.g., organizing Refactoring Dojos, Code Kata sessions)
Strong background in testing and developer tooling (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course creation)
concerns: Limited direct experience in build systems, testing infrastructure, or mobile-platform developer tools (only recent AI-agent tooling)
No evidence of leading organizational change or mobile-platform knowledge, which are preferred for this role
Most recent roles focus on full-stack or AI-agent infrastructure rather than pure developer productivity tooling
